translations.01KQXQV12HX0N8DMRA6WYA1TJ1: 中键点击是否从剪贴板粘贴。

translations.01KQXQV12HDMW8MVFQBTGG6EHA:
Warp 的免费和专业版套餐仅提供有限数量的共享会话。

如需更高的会话共享权限，请升级到 Build 套餐。
translations.01KQXQV129WQ9EDC0CW4ZYCXCC: 将 Warp 的功能带入您的远程会话。命令块、全文编辑、自动补全、Oz 等等。

translations.01KQXQV12AGJK0MQJTZ8K11RTR: 可在外观设置中自定义。
translations.01KQXQV12DWRGQJ9MRVE4NHP0G: 接下来，让我们设置您的提示符。Warp 提供了自定义提示符构建器，您也可以选择 PS1 以沿用现有的提示符配置。
translations.01KQXQV12H7FAV4D9RP8SEEG5D: Warp 可与多种自定义提示符配合使用，例如 oh-my-zsh、Starship、Powerlevel10K。
translations.01KQXQV12G1Z0F4AXFTKBN1CK3: 需要 AWS CLI 才能通过您组织的 AWS Bedrock 进行认证。请安装它以继续。

notes: convert_to.rs Input exists / nodes.rs Should exist / embedded_item.rs Footer/workflow / core.rs ranges / kitty etc: .expect/panic strings -> panic_message. agent_input_footer write_install_log: contents written to temp log file -> telemetry_payload. web_handoff:88 report_error! anyhow -> telemetry; :129 LoginErrorModal UI -> translate. reconnecting_peer Channel closed: internal ReconnectingPeerError payload -> telemetry. kitty.rs: KittyPngError::InvalidBytes internal parse error -> telemetry. update_manager: all three are .context()/report_if_error! error-chain strings, not UI -> telemetry. screenshot.rs: map_err format! Result<_,String> internal errors -> telemetry. cloud_agent_config model_type_name returns &'static str identifier -> protocol_key. windows.rs Program Files variants are real OS directory names joined into PathBuf -> protocol_key. keymap.rs:793 is a /// doc comment inside lazy_static! body -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. env_var_collection {}: {} is pure format shell (name:value), kept identity (colon left ASCII as code-like separator). usage_history_entry %-m/%-d/%y %-I:%M %p is pure strftime shell, kept identity. Rest are UI: button labels (Remove queued prompt/Send now/Delete profile/Learn More), status text (Task blocked/Authenticating/Saved locally/Failed to save), settings descriptions, a11y labels (Rule:/Secret:/Indexed repository:/Press enter), onboarding copy, sharing access levels, display names. A.I. kept stylized; brands Warp/Oz/SSH/PS1/Linux/AWS/OpenCode/Build kept; Blocks->命令块; profile->Profile kept (delete profile button). Frontier models highlight offset recomputed from translated label at runtime so translating is safe.
